purpose: Cases the domain MUST handle correctly. Loading should clearly change the agent's response from generic to domain-specific.

cases.title: Most common task in your domain
cases.input: [paste the user prompt that triggers your domain's typical task]
cases.expected_without_kdna: [what a baseline agent would say — usually surface-level]
cases.expected_with_kdna: [what your domain produces — root cause / specific terminology / boundary awareness]
must_not_contain: generic advice phrase you want to avoid

cases.title: A case requiring the agent to apply an axiom non-obviously
